interpretation: Prior-only EV overlay validation for base_ev_model used risk_adjusted threshold selection on 1 fold(s). The top sample-gated policy was order_10_any_execution_risk_adjusted: overlay ROI 6.2%, unfiltered same-day ROI 6.2%, and ROI lift 0.0%. 1/1 fold(s) met the next-day sample gate and 0/1 both improved ROI and reduced drawdown.
